info.name: Temis DMN Engine API
info.description:
HTTP interface to the Temis DMN 1.5 decision engine.

Set the **baseUrl** and **token** variables (or import the `temis.blumer.cloud` environment). The collection sends `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` on the /v1 endpoints; leave token empty for an open server.

- **Discovery & Health** — public endpoints (Swagger UI, spec, probes)
- **Models** — upload a model, then evaluate it by id
- **Stateless Evaluate — Examples** — self-contained example calls

Examples mirror dmn/testdata/models and the engine's golden tests.

item.name: Discovery & Health
item.description: Public endpoints — reachable even when the API requires a token.

request.description: The embedded OpenAPI 3 contract that Swagger UI loads.

item.name: Models — Upload & Evaluate (stateful)
item.description: Upload a model once, then evaluate it by id. Run the three requests in order; step 1 stores {{modelId}}.

request.description: Upload the raw DMN XML. The response carries a content-addressed modelId, which is saved to the {{modelId}} collection variable for the next requests.

body.raw:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/MODEL/"
             xmlns:dmndi="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/DMNDI/"
             xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DC/"
             xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DI/"
             id="dish_definitions"
             name="Dish"
             namespace="http://temis.test/dish">
  <inputData id="id_season" name="Season"/>
  <inputData id="id_guests" name="Guest Count"/>
  <decision id="id_dish" name="Dish">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_season">
      <requiredInput href="#id_season"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement id="ir_guests">
      <requiredInput href="#id_guests"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <decisionTable id="dt_dish" hitPolicy="UNIQUE">
      <input id="in_season" label="Season">
        <inputExpression typeRef="string">
          <text>Season</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <input id="in_guests" label="Guest Count">
        <inputExpression typeRef="number">
          <text>Guest Count</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="out_dish" name="Dish" typeRef="string"/>
      <rule id="r1">
        <inputEntry><text>"Fall"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text><= 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Spareribs"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r2">
        <inputEntry><text>"Winter"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text><= 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Roastbeef"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r3">
        <inputEntry><text>"Spring"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>[5..8]</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Steak"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r4">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>> 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Stew"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
  <dmndi:DMNDI>
    <dmndi:DMNDiagram id="diagram_1">
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_season" dmnElementRef="id_season">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_guests" dmnElementRef="id_guests">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_dish" dmnElementRef="id_dish">
        <dc:Bounds x="280" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNEdge id="edge_season" dmnElementRef="ir_season">
        <di:waypoint x="250" y="160"/>
        <di:waypoint x="340" y="260"/>
      </dmndi:DMNEdge>
    </dmndi:DMNDiagram>
  </dmndi:DMNDI>
</definitions>

request.description: Read the cached model's decisions and inputs.
Evaluate a decision of the uploaded model. Try other seasons/guest counts from the saved examples.

item.name: Stateless Evaluate — Examples
item.description: Each request inlines one example DMN model and evaluates it in a single call (POST /v1/evaluate). No upload needed — Send and read the outputs.

request.description: Seasonal dish recommendation (hit policy UNIQUE). Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/MODEL/"
             xmlns:dmndi="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/DMNDI/"
             xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DC/"
             xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DI/"
             id="dish_definitions"
             name="Dish"
             namespace="http://temis.test/dish">
  <inputData id="id_season" name="Season"/>
  <inputData id="id_guests" name="Guest Count"/>
  <decision id="id_dish" name="Dish">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_season">
      <requiredInput href="#id_season"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement id="ir_guests">
      <requiredInput href="#id_guests"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <decisionTable id="dt_dish" hitPolicy="UNIQUE">
      <input id="in_season" label="Season">
        <inputExpression typeRef="string">
          <text>Season</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <input id="in_guests" label="Guest Count">
        <inputExpression typeRef="number">
          <text>Guest Count</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="out_dish" name="Dish" typeRef="string"/>
      <rule id="r1">
        <inputEntry><text>"Fall"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text><= 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Spareribs"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r2">
        <inputEntry><text>"Winter"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text><= 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Roastbeef"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r3">
        <inputEntry><text>"Spring"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>[5..8]</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Steak"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r4">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>> 8</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Stew"</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
  <dmndi:DMNDI>
    <dmndi:DMNDiagram id="diagram_1">
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_season" dmnElementRef="id_season">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_guests" dmnElementRef="id_guests">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_dish" dmnElementRef="id_dish">
        <dc:Bounds x="280" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNEdge id="edge_season" dmnElementRef="ir_season">
        <di:waypoint x="250" y="160"/>
        <di:waypoint x="340" y="260"/>
      </dmndi:DMNEdge>
    </dmndi:DMNDiagram>
  </dmndi:DMNDI>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Dish",
  "input": {
    "Season": "Winter",
    "Guest Count": 4
  }
}

request.description: Customer discount tier from type + order total. Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20211108/MODEL/"
             id="discount_definitions"
             name="Discount"
             namespace="http://temis.test/discount">
  <inputData id="id_customer" name="Customer Type"/>
  <inputData id="id_order" name="Order Total"/>
  <decision id="id_discount" name="Discount">
    <informationRequirement>
      <requiredInput href="#id_customer"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement>
      <requiredInput href="#id_order"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <decisionTable id="dt_discount" hitPolicy="FIRST">
      <input id="in_customer" label="Customer Type">
        <inputExpression typeRef="string">
          <text>Customer Type</text>
        </inputExpression>
        <inputValues>
          <text>"Business","Private"</text>
        </inputValues>
      </input>
      <input id="in_order" label="Order Total">
        <inputExpression typeRef="number">
          <text>Order Total</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="out_discount" name="Discount" typeRef="number"/>
      <rule id="d1">
        <inputEntry><text>"Business"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>>= 1000</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.15</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="d2">
        <inputEntry><text>"Business"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.10</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="d3">
        <inputEntry><text>"Private"</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.05</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Discount",
  "input": {
    "Customer Type": "Business",
    "Order Total": 1500
  }
}

request.description: Age-based eligibility check (DMN 1.3 model, tolerantly decoded). Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20191111/MODEL/"
             xmlns:temis="http://temis.test/ext"
             id="routing_definitions"
             name="Routing"
             namespace="http://temis.test/routing">
  <temis:note>generated fixture for the unknown-element diagnostic</temis:note>
  <inputData id="id_age" name="Applicant Age"/>
  <decision id="id_eligibility" name="Eligibility">
    <informationRequirement>
      <requiredInput href="#id_age"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <literalExpression id="le_eligibility" typeRef="string">
      <text>if Applicant Age >= 18 then "ELIGIBLE" else "INELIGIBLE"</text>
    </literalExpression>
  </decision>
  <decision id="id_routing" name="Routing">
    <informationRequirement>
      <requiredDecision href="#id_eligibility"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <literalExpression id="le_routing" typeRef="string">
      <text>if Eligibility = "ELIGIBLE" then "ACCEPT" else "DECLINE"</text>
    </literalExpression>
  </decision>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Eligibility",
  "input": {
    "Applicant Age": 20
  }
}

request.description: Loan approval from credit score + annual income. Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/MODEL/"
             xmlns:dmndi="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/DMNDI/"
             xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DC/"
             id="loan_definitions"
             name="Loan Approval"
             namespace="http://temis.test/loan">
  <inputData id="id_score" name="Credit Score"/>
  <inputData id="id_income" name="Annual Income"/>
  <decision id="id_loan" name="Loan Approval">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_score">
      <requiredInput href="#id_score"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement id="ir_income">
      <requiredInput href="#id_income"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <decisionTable id="dt_loan" hitPolicy="FIRST">
      <input id="in_score" label="Credit Score">
        <inputExpression typeRef="number">
          <text>Credit Score</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <input id="in_income" label="Annual Income">
        <inputExpression typeRef="number">
          <text>Annual Income</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="out_decision" name="Decision" typeRef="string"/>
      <output id="out_rate" name="Interest Rate" typeRef="number"/>
      <rule id="r1">
        <inputEntry><text>< 600</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Declined"</text></outputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r2">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>< 30000</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Declined"</text></outputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r3">
        <inputEntry><text>>= 750</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Approved"</text></outputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.035</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r4">
        <inputEntry><text>>= 700</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Approved"</text></outputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.05</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r5">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>"Review"</text></outputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>0.08</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
  <dmndi:DMNDI>
    <dmndi:DMNDiagram id="diagram_loan">
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_score" dmnElementRef="id_score">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_income" dmnElementRef="id_income">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_loan" dmnElementRef="id_loan">
        <dc:Bounds x="280" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
    </dmndi:DMNDiagram>
  </dmndi:DMNDI>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Loan Approval",
  "input": {
    "Credit Score": 800,
    "Annual Income": 60000
  }
}

request.description: Risk scoring from boolean flags (Collect/SUM). Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/MODEL/"
             xmlns:dmndi="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/DMNDI/"
             xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DC/"
             id="risk_definitions"
             name="Risk Score"
             namespace="http://temis.test/risk">
  <inputData id="id_debt" name="Has Debt"/>
  <inputData id="id_new" name="Is New Customer"/>
  <decision id="id_risk" name="Risk Score">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_debt">
      <requiredInput href="#id_debt"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement id="ir_new">
      <requiredInput href="#id_new"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <decisionTable id="dt_risk" hitPolicy="COLLECT" aggregation="SUM">
      <input id="in_debt" label="Has Debt">
        <inputExpression typeRef="boolean">
          <text>Has Debt</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <input id="in_new" label="Is New Customer">
        <inputExpression typeRef="boolean">
          <text>Is New Customer</text>
        </inputExpression>
      </input>
      <output id="out_points" name="Risk Points" typeRef="number"/>
      <rule id="r1">
        <inputEntry><text>true</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>30</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r2">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>true</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>20</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
      <rule id="r3">
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <inputEntry><text>-</text></inputEntry>
        <outputEntry><text>5</text></outputEntry>
      </rule>
    </decisionTable>
  </decision>
  <dmndi:DMNDI>
    <dmndi:DMNDiagram id="diagram_risk">
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_debt" dmnElementRef="id_debt">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_new" dmnElementRef="id_new">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_risk" dmnElementRef="id_risk">
        <dc:Bounds x="280" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
    </dmndi:DMNDiagram>
  </dmndi:DMNDI>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Risk Score",
  "input": {
    "Has Debt": true,
    "Is New Customer": true
  }
}

request.description: Exact-decimal net total (19.99 * 3 = 59.97, no float drift). Self-contained: the DMN XML is inlined, so just hit Send.

body.raw:
{
  "xml": "<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/MODEL/"
             xmlns:dmndi="https://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20230324/DMNDI/"
             xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DMN/20180521/DC/"
             id="pricing_definitions"
             name="Pricing"
             namespace="http://temis.test/pricing">
  <inputData id="id_price" name="Unit Price"/>
  <inputData id="id_qty" name="Quantity"/>
  <inputData id="id_name" name="Product Name"/>
  <decision id="id_net" name="Net Total">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_price">
      <requiredInput href="#id_price"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <informationRequirement id="ir_qty">
      <requiredInput href="#id_qty"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <literalExpression id="le_net" typeRef="number">
      <text>Unit Price * Quantity</text>
    </literalExpression>
  </decision>
  <decision id="id_label" name="Label">
    <informationRequirement id="ir_name">
      <requiredInput href="#id_name"/>
    </informationRequirement>
    <literalExpression id="le_label" typeRef="string">
      <text>upper case(substring(Product Name, 1, 3))</text>
    </literalExpression>
  </decision>
  <dmndi:DMNDI>
    <dmndi:DMNDiagram id="diagram_pricing">
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_price" dmnElementRef="id_price">
        <dc:Bounds x="160" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_qty" dmnElementRef="id_qty">
        <dc:Bounds x="400" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_name" dmnElementRef="id_name">
        <dc:Bounds x="640" y="100" width="180" height="60"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_net" dmnElementRef="id_net">
        <dc:Bounds x="280" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
      <dmndi:DMNShape id="shape_label" dmnElementRef="id_label">
        <dc:Bounds x="640" y="260" width="180" height="80"/>
      </dmndi:DMNShape>
    </dmndi:DMNDiagram>
  </dmndi:DMNDI>
</definitions>
",
  "decision": "Net Total",
  "input": {
    "Unit Price": 19.99,
    "Quantity": 3
  }
}
